title: Weekly Go China Radar Issue 004
subtitle: China-facing Web3 access, risk-first quant research, and verification-first market education.
scope: Issue 004 is a ready-for-review GCA content brief prepared for the 2026-05-20 public content slot. It explains the Go China Access narrative, planned non-custodial quant access modules, official Base Mainnet identity, and conservative risk boundaries. It is not live market data, not financial advice, not a buy or sell recommendation, and not a price forecast.

narrativeThemes.name: Go China Access as a research corridor
narrativeThemes.description: Frame GCA as a China-facing Web3 research and access narrative connected to education, verification, and planned non-custodial quant tooling.

narrativeThemes.name: Risk-first quant utility
narrativeThemes.description: Explain liquidation replay, backtesting, risk alerts, ENTRY_READY review, and position sizing as planned utility directions rather than live trading promises.

narrativeThemes.name: Verification before interaction
narrativeThemes.description: Keep the official Base Mainnet contract, GCA/USDT route, website, X, Telegram, and public risk pages easy to verify before any wallet interaction.

riskNotes: GCA is still early-stage and current liquidity is starter-depth only.
BaseScan token profile review is not complete until BaseScan publishes it.
Owner observed no wallet risk warning visible on 2026-05-14; this is not security-vendor approval or a permanent cross-wallet guarantee.
No third-party audit has been completed.

Public account UI, read-only wallet verification, and eligible 100 credits / GCA Member ledger records are live; the 10,000 GCA member benefit remains manual review and reserve-wallet processing only.
This issue must not be used as live market data, investment advice, or a trading signal.
